notes: Presumed contracted while on active duty as a result of strain. Pre-existing conditions known at membership commencement (on or after July 1, 1992) are excluded. Applies only to Chapter 411 retirement system members (police and firefighters in cities). Covers firefighters who passed regular civil service examination.

condition_specific: any disease of the lungs or respiratory tract
notes: Presumed contracted while on active duty as result of inhalation of noxious fumes, poison, or gases. Pre-existing conditions known at membership commencement (on or after July 1, 1992) are excluded.

condition_specific: prostate cancer, primary brain cancer, breast cancer, ovarian cancer, cervical cancer, uterine cancer, malignant melanoma, leukemia, non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, bladder cancer, colorectal cancer, multiple myeloma, testicular cancer, kidney cancer
notes: Cancer defined by § 411.1(6). Presumed contracted while on active duty as a result of that duty. Pre-existing conditions known at membership commencement (on or after July 1, 1992) are excluded.

condition_specific: HIV/AIDS, all strains of hepatitis, meningococcal meningitis, mycobacterium tuberculosis
notes: Infectious disease defined by § 411.1(11). Presumed contracted while on active duty as a result of that duty. Pre-existing conditions known at membership commencement (on or after July 1, 1992) are excluded.
